package example

import "context"

// Top-level function.
func DoThing(ctx context.Context, n int) error {
	return nil
}

// Another top-level function.
func helper() string {
	return "hi"
}

type Thing struct {
	name string
}

// Pointer-receiver method.
func (t *Thing) Name() string {
	return t.name
}

// Value-receiver method.
func (t Thing) Rename(n string) {
	t.name = n
}
